TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-life_waon a boong
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: rangi' niSo isahini kano' ila patawawen.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ niʃo is~θahini kanoʔ ila patawawən.
S.FORM: rangi' niSo isahini kano' ila patawawen.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ niʃo is~θahini kanoʔ ila patawawən.
S.TRANSL: What has been making you busy now?

S.PHON: əh s~θis~θkaʔ ʔœmʔœmæh kaʃo βaβœjœʔan.
əh s~θis~θkaʔ ʔœmʔœmæh kaʃo βaβœjœʔan.
S.TRANSL: I'm going to plant ginger in the mountains.

S.FORM: kaSo baboeyoe'an So'o sibaeaeh ay ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: kaʃo βaβœjœʔan ʃoʔo s~θiβææh aj ka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: kaSo baboeyoe'an So'o sibaeaeh ay ka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: kaʃo βaβœjœʔan ʃoʔo s~θiβææh aj ka mæʔijæh.
hajz~ðaʔ s~θiβææh roʃaʔ.
hajz~ðaʔ s~θiβææh roʃaʔ.
roʃaʔ minkoriŋan na kamamanraan.
roʃaʔ minkoriŋan na kamamanraan.
S.TRANSL: Two. Are they male or female?

S.PHON: əh minkoriŋan ʔæhæʔ kamamanraan ʔæhæʔ.
əh minkoriŋan ʔæhæʔ kamamanraan ʔæhæʔ.
taŋtaŋ. aj
taŋtaŋ. aj

S.FORM: eh tangtang noka kamasi'ael ka samiyan.
S.PHON: əh taŋtaŋ noka kamas~θiʔæl ka s~θamijan.
S.FORM: eh tangtang noka kamasi'ael ka samiyan.
S.PHON: əh taŋtaŋ noka kamas~θiʔæl ka s~θamijan.
ah ʔam komalam ila noka mæʔijæh.
ah ʔam komalam ila noka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: Manual labor for sectioning the field.

S.FORM: ah niSo baboeyoe' koza kin akoy kapamowa'.
S.PHON: ah niʃo βaβœjœʔ koz~ða kin akoj kapamowaʔ.
S.FORM: ah niSo baboeyoe' koza kin akoy kapamowa'.
S.PHON: ah niʃo βaβœjœʔ koz~ða kin akoj kapamowaʔ.
S.TRANSL: Ah, how much ginger do you plant?

S.PHON: ʔæhæʔ s~θijan tintin.
ʔæhæʔ s~θijan tintin.
ʔæhæʔ s~θijan ʔœmʔœmæh kin ʔakoj.
ʔæhæʔ s~θijan ʔœmʔœmæh kin ʔakoj.
S.TRANSL: 那麼大的地只種一千斤?

TRANSL.notes: One thousand (only) for such a big piece of land?

S.TRANSL: One thousand for such a big piece of land?

S.FORM: niSo' 'aehae' siyan tintin niSo' so mayhael pamowa' 'am komowih ila ka babaiw 'am koza ila kin 'akoy tintin.
S.PHON: niʃoʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θijan tintin niʃoʔ s~θo majhæl pamowaʔ ʔam komowih ila ka βaβaiw ʔam koz~ða ila kin ʔakoj tintin.
S.FORM: niSo' 'aehae' siyan tintin niSo' so mayhael pamowa' 'am komowih ila ka babaiw 'am koza ila kin 'akoy tintin.
S.PHON: niʃoʔ ʔæhæʔ s~θijan tintin niʃoʔ s~θo majhæl pamowaʔ ʔam komowih ila ka βaβaiw ʔam koz~ða ila kin ʔakoj tintin.
S.TRANSL: 你若種一千斤,那麼明年收穫要賣多少?應該很多吧.
If you're planting a thousand kilos, then after the harvest next year, how much are you going to sell? Must be lots of kilos.

S.FORM: so kayzaeh ka kaelaehaeng 'ana'oka' ma 'am hayza' 'aehae' babaki' ila.
S.PHON: s~θo kajz~ðæh ka kælæhæŋ ʔanaʔokaʔ ma ʔam hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ βaβakiʔ ila.
S.FORM: so kayzaeh ka kaelaehaeng 'ana'oka' ma 'am hayza' 'aehae' babaki' ila.
S.PHON: s~θo kajz~ðæh ka kælæhæŋ ʔanaʔokaʔ ma ʔam hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ βaβakiʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 如果管理得好,大概至少有一萬斤.
If managed well, then probably at least ten thousand kilos.

S.PHON: ai kin ʔakoj kin.
ai kin ʔakoj kin.
ʔihiʔ ʔæhæʔ βaβakiʔ kintomal.
ʔihiʔ ʔæhæʔ βaβakiʔ kintomal.
ʔihiʔ ah rajhil ʔam koz~ðaʔ ila kin ʔakoj.
ʔihiʔ ah rajhil ʔam koz~ðaʔ ila kin ʔakoj.

S.FORM: rayhil kik raami so nak haysa'an 'aehae' tal'oemaeh 'oka' nanaw kabaiwan.
S.PHON: rajhil kik raami s~θo nak hajs~θaʔan ʔæhæʔ talʔœmæh ʔokaʔ nanaw kaβaiwan.
S.FORM: rayhil kik raami so nak haysa'an 'aehae' tal'oemaeh 'oka' nanaw kabaiwan.
S.PHON: rajhil kik raami s~θo nak hajs~θaʔan ʔæhæʔ talʔœmæh ʔokaʔ nanaw kaβaiwan.
S.TRANSL: 我不知道.像今年價格都不好.
I don't know. Like this year, prices are not good.

S.PHON: m hajz~ða aj mamowaʔ ka ʔaromaʔ.
m hajz~ða aj mamowaʔ ka ʔaromaʔ.
mamowaʔ ka ʔaromaʔ βo ʔinijaβowaj ʔiʔiniʔ pamowaʔ.
mamowaʔ ka ʔaromaʔ βo ʔinijaβowaj ʔiʔiniʔ pamowaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 其他的?會結果的水果類,還沒有種.

S.PHON: ah tatimæʔ hajz~ða aj mamowaʔ.
ah tatimæʔ hajz~ða aj mamowaʔ.

S.FORM: a kasi'aelen nonak hayza titi'an pamowa'.
S.PHON: a kas~θiʔælən nonak hajz~ða titiʔan pamowaʔ.
S.FORM: a kasi'aelen nonak hayza titi'an pamowa'.
S.PHON: a kas~θiʔælən nonak hajz~ða titiʔan pamowaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 是的.我有種一些蔬菜自己吃.
Yes, I do plant a bit of vegetables for our own consumption.

S.FORM: ma ao mamowa' ka nonak kayzaeh ka kasi'aelen ra 'ini nonak.
S.PHON: ma ao mamowaʔ ka nonak kajz~ðæh ka kas~θiʔælən ra ʔini nonak.
S.FORM: ma ao mamowa' ka nonak kayzaeh ka kasi'aelen ra 'ini nonak.
S.PHON: ma ao mamowaʔ ka nonak kajz~ðæh ka kas~θiʔælən ra ʔini nonak.
S.TRANSL: It's better for your own consumption.

S.FORM: 'ihi'' mamowa' ka 'oka' noka pamowa'i ka babaiw.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔʔ mamowaʔ ka ʔokaʔ noka pamowaʔi ka βaβaiw.
S.FORM: 'ihi'' mamowa' ka 'oka' noka pamowa'i ka babaiw.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔʔ mamowaʔ ka ʔokaʔ noka pamowaʔi ka βaβaiw.
S.TRANSL: 你沒有種一些你可以賣的?
You don't plant anything to sell?

S.FORM: babaiw hiya' ay ila raam hi 'ataw.
S.PHON: βaβaiw hijaʔ aj ila raam hi ʔataw.
S.FORM: babaiw hiya' ay ila raam hi 'ataw.
S.PHON: βaβaiw hijaʔ aj ila raam hi ʔataw.
S.TRANSL: 要賣?誰知道?要看Ataw的意思.

TRANSL.notes: For selling? Who knows? (It's up to) Ataw.

S.PHON: ai ʔam ʔataw mamowaʔ ʔam niʃo korkoriŋ mamowaʔ.
ai ʔam ʔataw mamowaʔ ʔam niʃo korkoriŋ mamowaʔ.
S.TRANSL: Ataw is going to plant. Your child is going to plant.

S.FORM: 'ihi' sia ray taew'an kano' patawawen ni 'ataw.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ s~θia raj tæwʔan kanoʔ patawawən ni ʔataw.
S.FORM: 'ihi' sia ray taew'an kano' patawawen ni 'ataw.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ s~θia raj tæwʔan kanoʔ patawawən ni ʔataw.
S.TRANSL: What does Ataw do at home?

S.FORM: eh siska 'i'iyokan ka tatatimaehan span ka tataa'.
S.PHON: əh s~θis~θka ʔiʔijokan ka tatatimæhan s~θpan ka tataaʔ.
S.FORM: eh siska 'i'iyokan ka tatatimaehan span ka tataa'.
S.PHON: əh s~θis~θka ʔiʔijokan ka tatatimæhan s~θpan ka tataaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他管理一個橘子園,種菜,養雞.
He tends an orange orchard, plants vegetables, raises chickens.

S.PHON: ʔakoj aj tataaʔ s~θpanan.
ʔakoj aj tataaʔ s~θpanan.

S.FORM: m haysani nakhara monaseb o hayza.
S.PHON: m hajs~θani nakhara monas~θəβ o hajz~ða.
S.FORM: m haysani nakhara monaseb o hayza.
S.PHON: m hajs~θani nakhara monas~θəβ o hajz~ða.
S.TRANSL: Right now, there are like ... fifty.

S.PHON: oβæh kin ʔakoj s~θiβaiw. aj
oβæh kin ʔakoj s~θiβaiw. aj

TRANSL.notes: Wow! So many! Do you sell (them)?

S.TRANSL: Wow! So many! Do you sell ?

S.FORM: ma so hayza ka mae'iyaeh mwai' mari' ma' sibaiw.
S.PHON: ma s~θo hajz~ða ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ mariʔ maʔ s~θiβaiw.
S.FORM: ma so hayza ka mae'iyaeh mwai' mari' ma' sibaiw.
S.PHON: ma s~θo hajz~ða ka mæʔijæh mwaiʔ mariʔ maʔ s~θiβaiw.
S.TRANSL: 是啊,若有人來買他就賣.

TRANSL.notes: Yes, if anybody comes (to buy).

S.PHON: m ʔæhæʔ tintin koz~ða s~θo.
m ʔæhæʔ tintin koz~ða s~θo.
ah kajz~ðæh. aj
ah kajz~ðæh. aj
alikah aj kas~θpanən.
alikah aj kas~θpanən.
S.TRANSL: Ah, is it easy to raise them?

S.FORM: ma'ngel so non 'inonaka ka ka'ina'an pas'oesizo soizin mwai' kasisiyap ma'angel atomalan.
S.PHON: maʔŋəl s~θo non ʔinonaka ka kaʔinaʔan pas~θʔœs~θiz~ðo s~θoiz~ðin mwaiʔ kas~θis~θijap maʔaŋəl atomalan.
S.FORM: ma'ngel so non 'inonaka ka ka'ina'an pas'oesizo soizin mwai' kasisiyap ma'angel atomalan.
S.PHON: maʔŋəl s~θo non ʔinonaka ka kaʔinaʔan pas~θʔœs~θiz~ðo s~θoiz~ðin mwaiʔ kas~θis~θijap maʔaŋəl atomalan.
S.TRANSL: 母雞孵蛋的話,小雞比較慢孵出來.
It takes long for the eggs to hatch if the hen sits on them.

S.FORM: e isaza koSa'en inkakhayza'an 'am mita' ka kaspanen tataa' kamasaseez kamama'ngel. ay
S.PHON: ə is~θaz~ða koʃaʔən inkakhajz~ðaʔan ʔam mitaʔ ka kas~θpanən tataaʔ kamas~θas~θəəz~ð kamamaʔŋəl. aj
S.FORM: e isaza koSa'en inkakhayza'an 'am mita' ka kaspanen tataa' kamasaseez kamama'ngel. ay
S.PHON: ə is~θaz~ða koʃaʔən inkakhajz~ðaʔan ʔam mitaʔ ka kas~θpanən tataaʔ kamas~θas~θəəz~ð kamamaʔŋəl. aj
S.TRANSL: 我們以前養的雞長得很慢.
The chicks we raised before grew very slowly.

S.FORM: 'ihi'' ai ray babih baiw ay hahoeran baiw ka kaspanan.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔʔ ai raj βaβih βaiw aj hahœran βaiw ka kas~θpanan.
S.FORM: 'ihi'' ai ray babih baiw ay hahoeran baiw ka kaspanan.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔʔ ai raj βaβih βaiw aj hahœran βaiw ka kas~θpanan.
S.TRANSL: 從別得地方買來嗎,還是從都市買的?
Were they bought from other places, or from the city?

S.PHON: ʔokaʔ.
ʔokaʔ.

S.FORM: m 'ampoa' 'okay sepan ka inay hahoeran noka noka sinraehoe'a ka paseez ka 'oesizo' hara mwai' ila kasisiyap kamararahoe' 'ampowa' 'okay sepan ka isaa.
S.PHON: m ʔampoaʔ ʔokaj s~θəpan ka inaj hahœran noka noka s~θinræhœʔa ka pas~θəəz~ð ka ʔœs~θiz~ðoʔ hara mwaiʔ ila kas~θis~θijap kamararahœʔ ʔampowaʔ ʔokaj s~θəpan ka is~θaa.
S.FORM: m 'ampoa' 'okay sepan ka inay hahoeran noka noka sinraehoe'a ka paseez ka 'oesizo' hara mwai' ila kasisiyap kamararahoe' 'ampowa' 'okay sepan ka isaa.
S.PHON: m ʔampoaʔ ʔokaj s~θəpan ka inaj hahœran noka noka s~θinræhœʔa ka pas~θəəz~ð ka ʔœs~θiz~ðoʔ hara mwaiʔ ila kas~θis~θijap kamararahœʔ ʔampowaʔ ʔokaj s~θəpan ka is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 你為什麼不養那種可以用機器孵蛋的?那種比較快生小雞,小雞也長得快.
Why don't you raise those which were incubated? They hatch faster and the chicks are bigger.

S.FORM: inakisaza'an sepanen 'a a hahoeran ma'iaeh koSa somay'akoyan o.
S.PHON: inakis~θaz~ðaʔan s~θəpanən ʔa a hahœran maʔiæh koʃa s~θomajʔakojan o.
S.FORM: inakisaza'an sepanen 'a a hahoeran ma'iaeh koSa somay'akoyan o.
S.PHON: inakis~θaz~ðaʔan s~θəpanən ʔa a hahœran maʔiæh koʃa s~θomajʔakojan o.
S.TRANSL: 都市的人都這麼說,他們養了很多.
The people from the city say so; they raise plenty of them.

S.PHON: ʔæwhæj kas~θiʔælən.
ʔæwhæj kas~θiʔælən.
maʔ ʔokaj koʃa ʔæwhæj kas~θiʔælən.
maʔ ʔokaj koʃa ʔæwhæj kas~θiʔælən.
S.TRANSL: It's not that they taste bad.

S.FORM: m sel lasia ray tono' koSa nimon hiza tabo ka baiw tatabo.
S.PHON: m s~θəl las~θia raj tonoʔ koʃa nimon hiz~ða taβo ka βaiw tataβo.
S.FORM: m sel lasia ray tono' koSa nimon hiza tabo ka baiw tatabo.
S.PHON: m s~θəl las~θia raj tonoʔ koʃa nimon hiz~ða taβo ka βaiw tataβo.
S.TRANSL: 他們在想要餵什麼飼料.
They're thinking what you feed them.

S.FORM: ah noka isaa ta ta'asen ma.
S.PHON: ah noka is~θaa ta taʔas~θən ma.
S.FORM: ah noka isaa ta ta'asen ma.
S.PHON: ah noka is~θaa ta taʔas~θən ma.

TRANSL.notes: (If) you let them free.

S.PHON: m hajs~θia hiŋhæʔ.
m hajs~θia hiŋhæʔ.

S.FORM: m hiza ka tataa' hayza' ay taboon noka Sakap pa'aewpil hini' ka biae'.
S.PHON: m hiz~ða ka tataaʔ hajz~ðaʔ aj taβoon noka ʃakap paʔæwpil hiniʔ ka βiæʔ.
S.FORM: m hiza ka tataa' hayza' ay taboon noka Sakap pa'aewpil hini' ka biae'.
S.PHON: m hiz~ða ka tataaʔ hajz~ðaʔ aj taβoon noka ʃakap paʔæwpil hiniʔ ka βiæʔ.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ma'an ka anoka poer'oe' inoka aewpil ma' hayza' tabo'on.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh maʔan ka anoka pœrʔœʔ inoka æwpil maʔ hajz~ðaʔ taβoʔon.
S.FORM: kayzaeh ma'an ka anoka poer'oe' inoka aewpil ma' hayza' tabo'on.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh maʔan ka anoka pœrʔœʔ inoka æwpil maʔ hajz~ðaʔ taβoʔon.
S.TRANSL: 我用蔬菜葉子,也用蕃薯葉子.
I use vegetable leaves; I also use yam leaves.

S.FORM: tabo'on noka aewpil alikih alikah ila rahoe' ki Sakap.
S.PHON: taβoʔon noka æwpil alikih alikah ila rahœʔ ki ʃakap.
S.FORM: tabo'on noka aewpil alikih alikah ila rahoe' ki Sakap.
S.PHON: taβoʔon noka æwpil alikih alikah ila rahœʔ ki ʃakap.
S.TRANSL: 餵蕃薯葉他們長的比較快.

S.FORM: hinghae' ai hiza tataa' koSa'en kamasaseez nanaw alikah hayza'an mita' span ka tataa' isaa kamasaseez nanaw 'anataboon ma' hinghae' ma'ngel sobaeoeh.
S.PHON: hiŋhæʔ ai hiz~ða tataaʔ koʃaʔən kamas~θas~θəəz~ð nanaw alikah hajz~ðaʔan mitaʔ s~θpan ka tataaʔ is~θaa kamas~θas~θəəz~ð nanaw ʔanataβoon maʔ hiŋhæʔ maʔŋəl s~θoβæœh.
S.FORM: hinghae' ai hiza tataa' koSa'en kamasaseez nanaw alikah hayza'an mita' span ka tataa' isaa kamasaseez nanaw 'anataboon ma' hinghae' ma'ngel sobaeoeh.
S.PHON: hiŋhæʔ ai hiz~ða tataaʔ koʃaʔən kamas~θas~θəəz~ð nanaw alikah hajz~ðaʔan mitaʔ s~θpan ka tataaʔ is~θaa kamas~θas~θəəz~ð nanaw ʔanataβoon maʔ hiŋhæʔ maʔŋəl s~θoβæœh.
S.TRANSL: 我們之前養的雞都很小,很久才長大,不管你餵他們什麼.
The chicken we raised before were small and it took long for them to grow, whatever you feed them.

S.PHON: ʔihiʔ mhm ʔam is~θaz~ða.
ʔihiʔ mhm ʔam is~θaz~ða.

S.FORM: rangi' So'o isahini siska kano' ila.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ ʃoʔo is~θahini s~θis~θka kanoʔ ila.
S.FORM: rangi' So'o isahini siska kano' ila.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ ʃoʔo is~θahini s~θis~θka kanoʔ ila.

S.FORM: yako 'ima mamowa' ka ka'niw hato mamaongan.
S.PHON: jako ʔima mamowaʔ ka kaʔniw hato mamaoŋan.
S.FORM: yako 'ima mamowa' ka ka'niw hato mamaongan.
S.PHON: jako ʔima mamowaʔ ka kaʔniw hato mamaoŋan.
ai ʔakoj aj pamowaʔan.
ai ʔakoj aj pamowaʔan.

S.FORM: ma'an pamowa'an ititi'an nanaw okik lal'oz noka mae'iyaeh mari'in baiwin.
S.PHON: maʔan pamowaʔan ititiʔan nanaw okik lalʔoz~ð noka mæʔijæh mariʔin βaiwin.
S.FORM: ma'an pamowa'an ititi'an nanaw okik lal'oz noka mae'iyaeh mari'in baiwin.
S.PHON: maʔan pamowaʔan ititiʔan nanaw okik lalʔoz~ð noka mæʔijæh mariʔin βaiwin.
S.TRANSL: Just a bit. Not enough to sell.

S.PHON: maʔ nakis~θaz~ða kajz~ðæh.
maʔ nakis~θaz~ða kajz~ðæh.
s~θo kois~θijaʔən atomalan maʔ.
s~θo kois~θijaʔən atomalan maʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (It's too troublesome) if (you plant) too much.

S.FORM: so 'akoy 'iyaatomalan ila mae'iyaeh 'okay wai' mari' ma' 'aewhaey boeloe atomal ka hahila.
S.PHON: s~θo ʔakoj ʔijaatomalan ila mæʔijæh ʔokaj waiʔ mariʔ maʔ ʔæwhæj βœlœ atomal ka hahila.
S.FORM: so 'akoy 'iyaatomalan ila mae'iyaeh 'okay wai' mari' ma' 'aewhaey boeloe atomal ka hahila.
S.PHON: s~θo ʔakoj ʔijaatomalan ila mæʔijæh ʔokaj waiʔ mariʔ maʔ ʔæwhæj βœlœ atomal ka hahila.
S.TRANSL: 種太多的話,沒人買也不好,只是浪費時間而已.

TRANSL.notes: If (you plant) too many, it's not good if nobody comes to buy (them). It's just a waste of time.

S.TRANSL: If too many, it's not good if nobody comes to buy . It's just a waste of time.

S.FORM: m 'oka' ila o boeloe' atomal ka hahila.
S.PHON: m ʔokaʔ ila o βœlœʔ atomal ka hahila.
S.FORM: m 'oka' ila o boeloe' atomal ka hahila.
S.PHON: m ʔokaʔ ila o βœlœʔ atomal ka hahila.

TRANSL.notes: (It's) just a waste of time.

S.FORM: m 'oka' ila o inak hini'an ma' nakhara ma'iaeh 'am si'ael ka 'imamanta' saboeh.
S.PHON: m ʔokaʔ ila o inak hiniʔan maʔ nakhara maʔiæh ʔam s~θiʔæl ka ʔimamantaʔ s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: m 'oka' ila o inak hini'an ma' nakhara ma'iaeh 'am si'ael ka 'imamanta' saboeh.
S.PHON: m ʔokaʔ ila o inak hiniʔan maʔ nakhara maʔiæh ʔam s~θiʔæl ka ʔimamantaʔ s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: Like ... some people like them raw.

S.FORM: ma lasia kiim ka 'imamanta' ka kasi'aelen isaa.
S.PHON: ma las~θia kiim ka ʔimamantaʔ ka kas~θiʔælən is~θaa.
S.FORM: ma lasia kiim ka 'imamanta' ka kasi'aelen isaa.
S.PHON: ma las~θia kiim ka ʔimamantaʔ ka kas~θiʔælən is~θaa.
komoʃa kajz~ðæh s~θiʔælən.
komoʃa kajz~ðæh s~θiʔælən.
las~θia βaiwin ka ʔimamantaʔ.
las~θia βaiwin ka ʔimamantaʔ.
ai ʔokaʔ ʔokajən ila ka.
ai ʔokaʔ ʔokajən ila ka.
ʔimamantaʔ ʔokaʔ ila kas~θols~θolon.
ʔimamantaʔ ʔokaʔ ila kas~θols~θolon.
S.TRANSL: The raw ones to be dried are sold out.

S.PHON: nakʔis~θa kajz~ðæh.
nakʔis~θa kajz~ðæh.
ititiʔan nanaw ka pamowaʔ.
ititiʔan nanaw ka pamowaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: We plant very few (mushrooms).

S.PHON: kajz~ðæh ka haw maks~θaʔ mwaiʔ.
kajz~ðæh ka haw maks~θaʔ mwaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 採比較大的香菇比較好,這樣小的才會長出來.

TRANSL.notes: It's good (to pick the bigger mushrooms so that) the little ones can grow soon.

S.TRANSL: It's good the little ones can grow soon.

S.PHON: ʔititiʔan.
ʔititiʔan.
ka kajz~ðæh kaj pakhœpaj.
ka kajz~ðæh kaj pakhœpaj.

S.FORM: XXXX m 'okik wa'isan kabaiwan ma' isaa 'am nak'ino'.
S.PHON: **** m ʔokik waʔis~θan kaβaiwan maʔ is~θaa ʔam nakʔinoʔ.
S.FORM: XXXX m 'okik wa'isan kabaiwan ma' isaa 'am nak'ino'.
S.PHON: **** m ʔokik waʔis~θan kaβaiwan maʔ is~θaa ʔam nakʔinoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 市場上的價格不好,我們怎麼辦?
The market price is not good. What can we do?

S.FORM: 'am 'okik potngor ka pinawka'an ka isaa rayhil o 'am baiw isaa ka topon na ka'niw.
S.PHON: ʔam ʔokik potŋor ka pinawkaʔan ka is~θaa rajhil o ʔam βaiw is~θaa ka topon na kaʔniw.
S.FORM: 'am 'okik potngor ka pinawka'an ka isaa rayhil o 'am baiw isaa ka topon na ka'niw.
S.PHON: ʔam ʔokik potŋor ka pinawkaʔan ka is~θaa rajhil o ʔam βaiw is~θaa ka topon na kaʔniw.
S.TRANSL: 還不夠錢去買可以吃的香菇.
It's not even enough money to cover the cost to buy the edible fungus or mushroom.

S.FORM: rangi' hiziyo' rima' naehaen ray bangol talboeyoe'.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ hiz~ðijoʔ rimaʔ næhæn raj βaŋol talβœjœʔ.
S.FORM: rangi' hiziyo' rima' naehaen ray bangol talboeyoe'.
S.PHON: raŋiʔ hiz~ðijoʔ rimaʔ næhæn raj βaŋol talβœjœʔ.
ʔokaʔ ila.
ʔokaʔ ila.
ʔokaʔ ila.
ʔokaʔ ila.

S.FORM: m sia mamowa' ila ka ka'niw.
S.PHON: m s~θia mamowaʔ ila ka kaʔniw.
S.FORM: m sia mamowa' ila ka ka'niw.
S.PHON: m s~θia mamowaʔ ila ka kaʔniw.
aj s~θia has~θaʔ talβœjœʔ o.
aj s~θia has~θaʔ talβœjœʔ o.
S.TRANSL: He doesn't know how to set traps.

S.PHON: nak is~θaz~ða. aj
nak is~θaz~ða. aj

S.FORM: m sia hasa' talboeyoe' sia hasa' tay'itol ka kahoey na.
S.PHON: m s~θia has~θaʔ talβœjœʔ s~θia has~θaʔ tajʔitol ka kahœj na.
S.FORM: m sia hasa' talboeyoe' sia hasa' tay'itol ka kahoey na.
S.PHON: m s~θia has~θaʔ talβœjœʔ s~θia has~θaʔ tajʔitol ka kahœj na.
S.TRANSL: 他不會設陷阱,也不會爬樹.
He doesn't know how to set traps, and he doesn't climb trees.

S.PHON: hai tikot tajʔitol ka kæhœj.
hai tikot tajʔitol ka kæhœj.

S.FORM: hiza haehoer ray kalhib patiyay pamowa'an nia ka pazay.
S.PHON: hiz~ða hæhœr raj kalhiβ patijaj pamowaʔan nia ka paz~ðaj.
S.FORM: hiza haehoer ray kalhib patiyay pamowa'an nia ka pazay.
S.PHON: hiz~ða hæhœr raj kalhiβ patijaj pamowaʔan nia ka paz~ðaj.
S.TRANSL: 他不是在蓬萊種稻米嗎?
Doesn't he plant rice there at Penglai?

S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ʔokaʔ ila hajs~θaniʔ ʔokaʔ ka ralom.
ʔokaʔ ila ʔokaʔ ila hajs~θaniʔ ʔokaʔ ka ralom.
hai az~ðawən az~ðawən o.
hai az~ðawən az~ðawən o.
jami o ʔam mamowaʔ ka kaʔniw.
jami o ʔam mamowaʔ ka kaʔniw.

S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hahila nom matawaw ka patiyay niya'om ka pataasen naehaen.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka hahila nom matawaw ka patijaj nijaʔom ka pataas~θən næhæn.
S.FORM: 'oka' ila ka hahila nom matawaw ka patiyay niya'om ka pataasen naehaen.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ ila ka hahila nom matawaw ka patijaj nijaʔom ka pataas~θən næhæn.
S.TRANSL: 我們沒有時間在田裡工作,需要延後.
We don't have time to work in the fields. We need to put it off first.

S.FORM: haw niya'om layanay ma' isaa matawaw ray babi.
S.PHON: haw nijaʔom lajanaj maʔ is~θaa matawaw raj βaβi.
S.FORM: haw niya'om layanay ma' isaa matawaw ray babi.
S.PHON: haw nijaʔom lajanaj maʔ is~θaa matawaw raj βaβi.
S.TRANSL: 我們媳婦在別的地方工作.
Our daughter-in-law also works in another place.

S.FORM: ma 'oka' nom talboewah ka hiza 'oka' nom talboewah ka patiai nomsia.
S.PHON: ma ʔokaʔ nom talβœwah ka hiz~ða ʔokaʔ nom talβœwah ka patiai noms~θia.
S.FORM: ma 'oka' nom talboewah ka hiza 'oka' nom talboewah ka patiai nomsia.
S.PHON: ma ʔokaʔ nom talβœwah ka hiz~ða ʔokaʔ nom talβœwah ka patiai noms~θia.
S.TRANSL: There's nobody to do the weeding and the cleaning of the place.

S.PHON: patpatalpətəh.
patpatalpətəh.

TRANSL.notes: ... and cut (some things).

S.PHON: kas~θaŋajan maʔ kajz~ðæh.
kas~θaŋajan maʔ kajz~ðæh.

TRANSL.notes: (Doing the cleaning) during the holiday is also good.

S.TRANSL: during the holiday is also good.

S.FORM: a 'oem'oemaeh so to towa'isin soelen ila nanaw.
S.PHON: a ʔœmʔœmæh s~θo to towaʔis~θin s~θœlən ila nanaw.
S.FORM: a 'oem'oemaeh so to towa'isin soelen ila nanaw.
S.PHON: a ʔœmʔœmæh s~θo to towaʔis~θin s~θœlən ila nanaw.
S.TRANSL: 田地若不處理好,就會長雜草.

TRANSL.notes: If one does not maintain the field, (the weeds will start to grow).

S.TRANSL: If one does not maintain the field, .

S.PHON: pamowaʔən ma ʔam ija ʔam ʔijaomz~ðæʔ.
pamowaʔən ma ʔam ija ʔam ʔijaomz~ðæʔ.

S.FORM: 'oka' ma'an hiza ka 'oem'oemaehan rai' ray kaminrawko'an.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ maʔan hiz~ða ka ʔœmʔœmæhan raiʔ raj kaminrawkoʔan.
S.FORM: 'oka' ma'an hiza ka 'oem'oemaehan rai' ray kaminrawko'an.
S.PHON: ʔokaʔ maʔan hiz~ða ka ʔœmʔœmæhan raiʔ raj kaminrawkoʔan.

TRANSL.notes: No. My field is located at the foot of the hill (where there are plenty of raoko plants.)

S.TRANSL: No. My field is located at the foot of the hill

S.PHON: ʔana pamowaʔən ka kanoʔ maʔ rikrika.
ʔana pamowaʔən ka kanoʔ maʔ rikrika.
S.TRANSL: 不管種什麼東西,天氣總是熱的.

TRANSL.notes: Whatever is planted, (the weather is always) hot.

S.PHON: s~θo rikrikæn ila maʔis~θaa.
s~θo rikrikæn ila maʔis~θaa.

S.FORM: 'ana pamowa'an tatimae' ma ayayo' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: ʔana pamowaʔan tatimæʔ ma ajajoʔ ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: 'ana pamowa'an tatimae' ma ayayo' ila saboeh.
S.PHON: ʔana pamowaʔan tatimæʔ ma ajajoʔ ila s~θaβœh.
mtariʔ jaʔ.
mtariʔ jaʔ.

S.FORM: ay nak nakisaa raamen ka ka 'i'izo' iyasama'an noka.
S.PHON: aj nak nakis~θaa raamən ka ka ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ ijas~θamaʔan noka.
S.FORM: ay nak nakisaa raamen ka ka 'i'izo' iyasama'an noka.
S.PHON: aj nak nakis~θaa raamən ka ka ʔiʔiz~ðoʔ ijas~θamaʔan noka.
S.TRANSL: Who knew that under the ground is clay soil?

S.PHON: ma ʔima nak is~θaz~ða ʔa.
ma ʔima nak is~θaz~ða ʔa.
ʔanhiʔ kas~θoratoran s~θo ʔam mamowaʔ ila.
ʔanhiʔ kas~θoratoran s~θo ʔam mamowaʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: If (you) have to plant.

S.FORM: amisan ila isaa pamowa'en ka kano'.
S.PHON: amis~θan ila is~θaa pamowaʔən ka kanoʔ.
S.FORM: amisan ila isaa pamowa'en ka kano'.
S.PHON: amis~θan ila is~θaa pamowaʔən ka kanoʔ.

S.FORM: hara poer'oe kamapotoy isaa inak isa'an.
S.PHON: hara pœrʔœ kamapotoj is~θaa inak is~θaʔan.
S.FORM: hara poer'oe kamapotoy isaa inak isa'an.
S.PHON: hara pœrʔœ kamapotoj is~θaa inak is~θaʔan.
mitaʔ hara s~θis~θka kapamowaʔ is~θaa.
mitaʔ hara s~θis~θka kapamowaʔ is~θaa.
S.TRANSL: Then we do the planting, like that.

S.PHON: ʔini nonak kas~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh.
ʔini nonak kas~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh.
S.TRANSL: Only good for ourselves to eat.

S.FORM: koSa mamowa' ka kababaiw ma' 'oka' ila yami pamowa'.
S.PHON: koʃa mamowaʔ ka kaβaβaiw maʔ ʔokaʔ ila jami pamowaʔ.
S.FORM: koSa mamowa' ka kababaiw ma' 'oka' ila yami pamowa'.
S.PHON: koʃa mamowaʔ ka kaβaβaiw maʔ ʔokaʔ ila jami pamowaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們種那些不是拿來賣的.
We don't plant those for sale.

S.FORM: may hiza mamaongan anhi' sem'el ila. ay
S.PHON: maj hiz~ða mamaoŋan anhiʔ s~θəmʔəl ila. aj
S.FORM: may hiza mamaongan anhi' sem'el ila. ay
S.PHON: maj hiz~ða mamaoŋan anhiʔ s~θəmʔəl ila. aj
S.TRANSL: 你經過那裡有沒有看到竹筍長出來?
Passing by there, have you seen the bamboo grow there?

S.PHON: ʔiʔiniʔ m s~θəmʔəl ila.
ʔiʔiniʔ m s~θəmʔəl ila.

S.FORM: roo' hayza' ay mamowa' ka miyowmi.
S.PHON: rooʔ hajz~ðaʔ aj mamowaʔ ka mijowmi.
S.FORM: roo' hayza' ay mamowa' ka miyowmi.
S.PHON: rooʔ hajz~ðaʔ aj mamowaʔ ka mijowmi.

S.FORM: hayza hayza yami 'oka' ka miyowmi kita' noka may hiza ka yami' may isaza 'okay kita' sem'el ila.
S.PHON: hajz~ða hajz~ða jami ʔokaʔ ka mijowmi kitaʔ noka maj hiz~ða ka jamiʔ maj is~θaz~ða ʔokaj kitaʔ s~θəmʔəl ila.
S.FORM: hayza hayza yami 'oka' ka miyowmi kita' noka may hiza ka yami' may isaza 'okay kita' sem'el ila.
S.PHON: hajz~ða hajz~ða jami ʔokaʔ ka mijowmi kitaʔ noka maj hiz~ða ka jamiʔ maj is~θaz~ða ʔokaj kitaʔ s~θəmʔəl ila.
S.TRANSL: 我們在那裡種的竹子,有人經過不會注意到有沒有長出來.
The bamboo we planted there, people passing by did not notice if they have grown.

S.FORM: o ma'an ka tataa' o bibi o tababen ka ka tabtaboon noka kamapotoypoer'oe so sahpiih ila yao 'am mamowa' ila ka.
S.PHON: o maʔan ka tataaʔ o βiβi o taβaβən ka ka taβtaβoon noka kamapotojpœrʔœ s~θo s~θahpiih ila jao ʔam mamowaʔ ila ka.
S.FORM: o ma'an ka tataa' o bibi o tababen ka ka tabtaboon noka kamapotoypoer'oe so sahpiih ila yao 'am mamowa' ila ka.
S.PHON: o maʔan ka tataaʔ o βiβi o taβaβən ka ka taβtaβoon noka kamapotojpœrʔœ s~θo s~θahpiih ila jao ʔam mamowaʔ ila ka.
S.TRANSL: 我用白菜餵鵝,如果白菜過期後,改種...
I use cabbage to feed the geese. When it is not the right time to plant cabbage, I grow other...

S.FORM: aewpil ka mari'in ka sakap tatabo ka bibi'.
S.PHON: æwpil ka mariʔin ka s~θakap tataβo ka βiβiʔ.
S.FORM: aewpil ka mari'in ka sakap tatabo ka bibi'.
S.PHON: æwpil ka mariʔin ka s~θakap tataβo ka βiβiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 蕃薯的藤都可以拿來餵鴨子.
The yam leaves are to feed the duck.

S.PHON: hai s~θo laʔoz~ð ila maʔ.
hai s~θo laʔoz~ð ila maʔ.

TRANSL.notes: If (the ducks have grown) enough,

S.FORM: kahihiwa'en ila kasi'aelen kapowa'en so tatini'in.
S.PHON: kahihiwaʔən ila kas~θiʔælən kapowaʔən s~θo tatiniʔin.
S.FORM: kahihiwa'en ila kasi'aelen kapowa'en so tatini'in.
S.PHON: kahihiwaʔən ila kas~θiʔælən kapowaʔən s~θo tatiniʔin.
S.TRANSL: 鴨子大了就可以殺,為何要養到老?
The ducks can be killed as soon as they grow old. Why do you raise them until old age?

S.PHON: ʔihiʔ ʔæwhæj ma ʔas~θʔas~θaj ka tataβo.
ʔihiʔ ʔæwhæj ma ʔas~θʔas~θaj ka tataβo.

S.FORM: 'ihi' So'o karim'aenan rima' ray hato sater hi rangi' 'ayon.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ ʃoʔo karimʔænan rimaʔ raj hato s~θatər hi raŋiʔ ʔajon.
S.FORM: 'ihi' So'o karim'aenan rima' ray hato sater hi rangi' 'ayon.
S.PHON: ʔihiʔ ʃoʔo karimʔænan rimaʔ raj hato s~θatər hi raŋiʔ ʔajon.
S.TRANSL: 你今早去幫親戚Ayon送行嗎?
Did you send off your relative Ayon this morning?

S.PHON: ʔima hinpilaz~ð.
ʔima hinpilaz~ð.
potŋor raj tæwʔan ʔima kaks~θiʔælan.
potŋor raj tæwʔan ʔima kaks~θiʔælan.
S.TRANSL: 我中午的時候到達Ayon家裡.

TRANSL.notes: Arrived at the (Ayon's) house at noon.

S.TRANSL: Arrived at the house at noon.

S.PHON: haj koms~θiʔæl næhæn raj tæwʔan.
haj koms~θiʔæl næhæn raj tæwʔan.
S.TRANSL: You ate lunch at Ayon's home first.

S.PHON: ʔihiʔ koms~θiʔæl næhæn tæwʔan o.
ʔihiʔ koms~θiʔæl næhæn tæwʔan o.
S.TRANSL: 是啊.我先在他家吃午餐.
Yes. I had lunch at her house first.

S.FORM: rima' naehaen kita' lasia 'am somobaboeyoe' haw.
S.PHON: rimaʔ næhæn kitaʔ las~θia ʔam s~θomoβaβœjœʔ haw.
S.FORM: rima' naehaen kita' lasia 'am somobaboeyoe' haw.
S.PHON: rimaʔ næhæn kitaʔ las~θia ʔam s~θomoβaβœjœʔ haw.
S.TRANSL: 吃過午餐後,我去看工人準備土壤.

TRANSL.notes: (After lunch), I went to see the workers preparing to plant ginger there.

S.TRANSL: , I went to see the workers preparing to plant ginger there.

S.PHON: is~θaahaw mœhæʔœ.
is~θaahaw mœhæʔœ.

TRANSL.notes: (They planted) in a downward direction then?

S.PHON: ʔam mamowaʔ kans~θoʔ.
ʔam mamowaʔ kans~θoʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (They) are going to plant your (ginger).

S.PHON: m ʔam piz~ðaʔ haw las~θia.
m ʔam piz~ðaʔ haw las~θia.

TRANSL.notes: How many (workers) are they?

S.PHON: tooʔ.
tooʔ.
tooʔ lahijahija.
tooʔ lahijahija.
ə ʔamaʔ no aki ki ʔaʔariʔ.
ə ʔamaʔ no aki ki ʔaʔariʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (Ayon's) son-in-law, Aki, and Aari.

S.FORM: ai aki' 'ama' no aki' ki aki' ki 'a'ari' 'a'ari' ari' insiya'a minkoringan.
S.PHON: ai akiʔ ʔamaʔ no akiʔ ki akiʔ ki ʔaʔariʔ ʔaʔariʔ ariʔ ins~θijaʔa minkoriŋan.
S.FORM: ai aki' 'ama' no aki' ki aki' ki 'a'ari' 'a'ari' ari' insiya'a minkoringan.
S.PHON: ai akiʔ ʔamaʔ no akiʔ ki akiʔ ki ʔaʔariʔ ʔaʔariʔ ariʔ ins~θijaʔa minkoriŋan.
ʔihiʔ hijaʔ is~θa ʔæhæʔ ʔæhæʔ. ****
ʔihiʔ hijaʔ is~θa ʔæhæʔ ʔæhæʔ. ****
ʔamaʔ no akiʔ.
ʔamaʔ no akiʔ.
ʔamaʔ no akiʔ.
ʔamaʔ no akiʔ.
m ki ariʔ.
m ki ariʔ.

S.FORM: ari' m hai 'ihi' ay ataw ay 'ataw 'ataw ma' hisia makakreng 'atomalan.
S.PHON: ariʔ m hai ʔihiʔ aj ataw aj ʔataw ʔataw maʔ his~θia makakrəŋ ʔatomalan.
S.FORM: ari' m hai 'ihi' ay ataw ay 'ataw 'ataw ma' hisia makakreng 'atomalan.
S.PHON: ariʔ m hai ʔihiʔ aj ataw aj ʔataw ʔataw maʔ his~θia makakrəŋ ʔatomalan.
mariʔani ila ka hi janaj.
mariʔani ila ka hi janaj.
S.TRANSL: He can get himself a wife.

S.PHON: hijaʔ aʔraama his~θia.
hijaʔ aʔraama his~θia.
S.TRANSL: Who wants to get married to him?

S.FORM: nisia nonak kita' o tatini' o hayza' ay ka howaw haysani.
S.PHON: nis~θia nonak kitaʔ o tatiniʔ o hajz~ðaʔ aj ka howaw hajs~θani.
S.FORM: nisia nonak kita' o tatini' o hayza' ay ka howaw haysani.
S.PHON: nis~θia nonak kitaʔ o tatiniʔ o hajz~ðaʔ aj ka howaw hajs~θani.
S.TRANSL: 讓他自己看看.對我麼老人而言,不關我們的事.

TRANSL.notes: Let him see for himself. (For us) old people, is it our business nowadays?

S.TRANSL: Let him see for himself. old people, is it our business nowadays?

S.PHON: maʔ is~θaa.
maʔ is~θaa.

S.FORM: niSo korkoring hayza' ka 'ima minowa' isaa kita' ila.
S.PHON: niʃo korkoriŋ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔima minowaʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ila.
S.FORM: niSo korkoring hayza' ka 'ima minowa' isaa kita' ila.
S.PHON: niʃo korkoriŋ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔima minowaʔ is~θaa kitaʔ ila.

TRANSL.notes: Your child (Ataw) has somebody she likes.

S.TRANSL: Your child has somebody she likes.

S.FORM: so mita' 'ana 'am hayza' nisia ka kapaylal'ozan ka katoka'anayan o so 'okay toeroe'ani mita' ma'an noka tatini' ma'an.
S.PHON: s~θo mitaʔ ʔana ʔam hajz~ðaʔ nis~θia ka kapajlalʔoz~ðan ka katokaʔanajan o s~θo ʔokaj tœrœʔani mitaʔ maʔan noka tatiniʔ maʔan.
S.FORM: so mita' 'ana 'am hayza' nisia ka kapaylal'ozan ka katoka'anayan o so 'okay toeroe'ani mita' ma'an noka tatini' ma'an.
S.PHON: s~θo mitaʔ ʔana ʔam hajz~ðaʔ nis~θia ka kapajlalʔoz~ðan ka katokaʔanajan o s~θo ʔokaj tœrœʔani mitaʔ maʔan noka tatiniʔ maʔan.
S.TRANSL: 他們怎會有緣份,若我們老人家不指給他們?
How would they have the predestination if we old people don't point it out to them?

S.FORM: 'am tikot lasia sasekla' 'am 'okik sasekla 'ita' tatini' 'anraan nasiya.
S.PHON: ʔam tikot las~θia s~θas~θəklaʔ ʔam ʔokik s~θas~θəkla ʔitaʔ tatiniʔ ʔanraan nas~θija.
S.FORM: 'am tikot lasia sasekla' 'am 'okik sasekla 'ita' tatini' 'anraan nasiya.
S.PHON: ʔam tikot las~θia s~θas~θəklaʔ ʔam ʔokik s~θas~θəkla ʔitaʔ tatiniʔ ʔanraan nas~θija.
S.TRANSL: 他們害怕.那要看我麼老人家知不知道哪些人適合他們.

TRANSL.notes: They are afraid. It's up to us old people (for them) to know or not to know suitable people."

S.TRANSL: They are afraid. It's up to us old people to know or not to know suitable people."

S.FORM: ma'an hayza' ila kastinoroe' ila o.
S.PHON: maʔan hajz~ðaʔ ila kas~θtinorœʔ ila o.
S.FORM: ma'an hayza' ila kastinoroe' ila o.
S.PHON: maʔan hajz~ðaʔ ila kas~θtinorœʔ ila o.

TRANSL.notes: I have pointed out (to him).

S.PHON: hajnoʔ.
hajnoʔ.
roʃaʔ ila o kas~θtinorœʔ.
roʃaʔ ila o kas~θtinorœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們幫他們指出兩個來了.
We've pointed out two to him.

S.PHON: ʃaiʃijat. aj
ʃaiʃijat. aj
maʔ ʃaiʃijat.
maʔ ʃaiʃijat.
s~θajʔinoʔ.
s~θajʔinoʔ.
ʔæhæʔ s~θaj rarəməwan.
ʔæhæʔ s~θaj rarəməwan.
aj inhijaʔa korkoriŋ.
aj inhijaʔa korkoriŋ.
m inalijoŋa.
m inalijoŋa.
ai is~θaz~ða mina ija.
ai is~θaz~ða mina ija.
S.TRANSL: That girl wants to get married to a SaiSiyat.

S.PHON: ija ininraji o s~θia o.
ija ininraji o s~θia o.
S.TRANSL: She wants to get married. She ...

S.FORM: ray kapna'misan 'am holoy nakhara koSa kayni ila lobih ray ka 'oeS'oeSoe'an ano'.
S.PHON: raj kapnaʔmis~θan ʔam holoj nakhara koʃa kajni ila loβih raj ka ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan anoʔ.
S.FORM: ray kapna'misan 'am holoy nakhara koSa kayni ila lobih ray ka 'oeS'oeSoe'an ano'.
S.PHON: raj kapnaʔmis~θan ʔam holoj nakhara koʃa kajni ila loβih raj ka ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan anoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 女方在北部上班,好像不太喜歡回鄉下住.

TRANSL.notes: (The girl's) working in the north. She doesn't seem to like to come back to the province.

S.TRANSL: working in the north. She doesn't seem to like to come back to the province.

S.FORM: ai 'am kiim ila nisia ka ray raehoeran ka taew'an.
S.PHON: ai ʔam kiim ila nis~θia ka raj ræhœran ka tæwʔan.
S.FORM: ai 'am kiim ila nisia ka ray raehoeran ka taew'an.
S.PHON: ai ʔam kiim ila nis~θia ka raj ræhœran ka tæwʔan.
S.TRANSL: She is looking for a house in the city.

S.PHON: ʔihiʔ.
ʔihiʔ.
